title: Noah Lucas homepage v028 proof-first staging hierarchy
changeSummary: Moves selected product work directly beneath the employer proof strip.
Reorders the supporting thesis, operating principles, research, writing, and investments into a proof-first narrative.
Tightens first-frame pacing on desktop viewports 800px tall or shorter.
Preserves the untinted Yosemite image layer and existing day/night glass treatments.
Leaves the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local HTTP server plus in-app browser at 1280x720 and 390x844.
checks: Desktop first viewport shows the untinted image, identity, employer proof, and the start of selected work.
Selected work precedes thesis and research content at both tested breakpoints.
Mobile day and night themes preserve readable contrast and interaction chrome.
No browser console warnings or errors were observed.
